title: index
body:
The current search only looks through index.json which contains 
just the first 100 chars of each note body. This means search 
misses content deeper in long notes.

Please implement a proper full-text search using a search index file:

- Create a search_index.json that stores the complete plain text 
  of every note (HTML tags stripped out), keyed by note ID
- Update this search index whenever a note is created, updated, 
  or deleted — same way index.json is maintained
- When the user searches, scan search_index.json for matches 
  across the full body text of all notes
- Return results ranked by relevance (title match ranked higher 
  than body match)
- Highlight the matching word/phrase in the search results preview
- This should stay fast even at 10,000 notes  

indextest 1441
